recent_contextual_leads.subject: she often has the latest news, including the details about the missing patrol, and typically can be found
recent_contextual_leads.position: at the tavern in the eastern square," replies the tavern runner, her expression shifting to one of urgency

missing_patrol.last_answer: "You might want to talk to Lirael, the town crier. She often has the latest news, including the details about the missing patrol, and typically can be found at the tavern in the eastern square," replies the tavern runner, her expression shifting to one of urgency. "Lord Aldric has also been known to frequent the old milestone and may have insights related to the patrol's disappearance. If you're looking for information, those are your best options."
